summary: AI Analysis Feature & PDF Export testing completed. All backend APIs passed (11/11 tests). Frontend 'Análisis Inteligente' tab working with full AI-generated content. The AI analysis takes ~20-25 seconds to generate via GPT-5.2 but renders correctly with all 6 sections: Executive Summary, Profitability Analysis, Returns Analysis, Liquidity Analysis, Solvency Analysis, and Strategic Recommendations.

minor.issue: Response time is slow (~20-25 seconds) due to multiple sequential GPT-5.2 API calls for each analysis section

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1, -1) during initial page load - cosmetic only

ai_analysis_tab.refresh_button: Actualizar Análisis button present and functional

pdf_export.verification: PDF button clickable and triggers download
pdf_export.note: PDF includes AI analysis sections when available

critical_code_review_comments: AI analysis makes 6 sequential API calls to GPT-5.2 (one per section). Consider parallelizing or caching to improve response time.
Default analysis fallback works correctly when LLM key budget is exhausted
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Analysis feature fully functional. Tab 'Análisis Inteligente' shows 6 analysis sections generated by GPT-5.2. Loading time is ~20-25 seconds. PDF export button works. All backend APIs for financial statements passing. Default fallback analysis works when AI budget exhausted.

mocked_apis.notes: All APIs are REAL - AI analysis uses Emergent LLM Key with GPT-5.2

response_structure.liquidity_analysis: Analysis of current ratio, quick ratio, working capital
response_structure.solvency_analysis: Analysis of debt ratios and interest coverage

ai_analysis_verification.fallback_behavior: Returns default analysis when LLM key unavailable
